description_long: This is a stylized AK-pattern assault rifle featuring a vibrant, cosmic-themed finish with swirling patterns of blue, red, and white across its body. The rifle has a classic fixed stock, a curved detachable box magazine, and a standard-length barrel. The receiver, handguard, and stock are all covered in the same colorful, galaxy-inspired design, giving the weapon a striking and unique appearance. The front and rear iron sights are visible, and the muzzle is fitted with a standard slant compensator. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal with some polymer components, typical of modern AK rifles.
description: A cosmic-themed AK-style rifle with a fixed stock, curved magazine, and standard iron sights, finished in swirling blue, red, and white patterns.
description_view_0: Front-on view showing the narrow profile, with the muzzle and front sight most prominent.
description_view_1: Left-side view displaying the full length, cosmic finish, curved magazine, and fixed stock.
description_view_2: Rear-on view highlighting the stock and the slim outline of the rifle.
description_view_3: Right-side view showing the same features as the left, with the cosmic pattern and magazine clearly visible.
